name: laicluse-agent-fieldkit
description: Marketplace-wide utilities for the laicluse-agent-fieldkit marketplace. Currently ships /whats-new (namespaced as /laicluse-agent-fieldkit:whats-new when needed), a one-stop reader for the post-update CHANGELOG section of any installed plugin.
